ogTitle: Rocky Glen vs Rocky Plain: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rocky Glen and Rocky Plain.
heading: Rocky Glen vs Rocky Plain — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rocky Glen, New South Wales and Rocky Plain, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rocky Glen and Rocky Plain have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Rocky Glen or Rocky Plain safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rocky Glen has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Rocky Plain scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rocky Glen scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Rocky Plain scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rocky Glen or Rocky Plain?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rocky Glen has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
